title: ⌛ Time Series & Phase Space Maps
name: ⌛ Time Series & Phase Space Maps
what_it_is: Time series show system behavior over time. Phase space maps track all possible states of a system. Together, they’re motion maps of reality.
how_to_use: her body a living time series—each gesture trails motion echoes across phase space
space folds into phase-mapped layers, every direction a memory of movement
animation_behavior: Fading trails, ghost limbs, recursive path echoes, memory-motion unfolding in real time
